channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Walmart Recalls Lettuce Linked to Cyclospora Outbreak
item.description: Taylor Farms de Mexico has initiated a voluntary recall of iceberg lettuce products sold at Walmart due to contamination with Cyclospora, a parasite linked to severe gastrointestinal illness. The reca...

item.title: Trump Pushes for Sanctions Against Iran Amid U.S. Troop Deaths in Jordan

item.title: Niger Delta pivots to agriculture for food security and economic revival
item.description: The Niger Delta region is undergoing a strategic shift from oil dependency to agriculture as part of a broader effort to achieve food security, create jobs, and attract investment. At a summit focused...

item.title: MP Gifts Catholic Priest New Car to Support Ministry in Kimilili
item.description: AbdulAziz Mulama, a parliamentary aspirant, surprised the congregation at St Leo Catholic Church in Kimilili by gifting the parish priest, Father Ndubi, a brand-new black VW car during Sunday service....

item.title: Astronomers Confirm Atmosphere on Rocky Exoplanet in a Habitable Zone
item.description: Astronomers have confirmed that the rocky exoplanet LHS 1140 b possesses an atmosphere while orbiting within the habitable zone of its host star, making it one of the most promising Earth-like worlds ...

item.title: Wildfire Evacuees Share Harrowing Experiences in Northwestern Ontario
item.description: Over 350 people from Whitesand First Nation and neighboring communities have evacuated due to wildfires burning across northern Ontario. Retired firefighter Daniel Nodin warned residents of the danger...

item.title: Zungu calls for revisiting Safa constitution to prevent factional misuse
